footer.tagline: Find the expert for every need.

home.heroTagline: Find the expert for every need
home.heroSub: Thousands of trusted professionals across Greece. Verified reviews, zero commission.
home.brandSub: The first platform in Greece that respects both the customer and the professional.
home.brandPoint1: Zero commission — the professional keeps 100% of their earnings
home.brandPoint2: Verified reviews — only from real customers
home.howStep1Desc: Choose a category and area to find professionals near you.
home.howStep2Desc: See reviews, prices and availability. Choose the best match for you.
home.howStep3Desc: Contact directly or book online. No middlemen.
home.proCtaSub: Sign up for free and start receiving clients from day one.
home.brandMission: Fair access. Fair price. 100% to the professional.
home.brandExplain: Professionals work hard — they shouldn't pay 15-20% of every job just to find clients. At Trustia.gr, they pay a fair fixed monthly amount and keep everything they earn. Customers find reliable professionals with verified reviews — no hidden fees, no surprises.
home.howHomeStep1Desc: Find the right professional from 51 categories in your area.
home.howHomeStep2Desc: Book online or call directly — you choose how.
home.howHomeStep3Desc: Leave a review after the service and help the community.
home.proSub: Join Trustia.gr with no commitment. Zero commission — keep 100% of your earnings.
home.proFoundingLock: First 50 lock in the Founding Price forever

howItWorks.title: How Trustia.gr Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Find professionals quickly, reliably, and without middlemen.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Choose a service category and type your area to find local professionals.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Browse profiles, reviews and prices. Choose the best professional for you.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Call directly or book online. Zero commission.
howItWorks.proStep1Desc: Create your professional profile in minutes.
howItWorks.proStep2Desc: Choose the plan that fits you. Start with a free trial.
howItWorks.proStep3Desc: Appear in search results and receive bookings.
howItWorks.heroSub1: Simple for customers. Fair for professionals.
howItWorks.heroSub2: Zero commission. One hundred percent earnings.
howItWorks.customerTitle: Find the right expert in 4 simple steps
howItWorks.customerStep1Desc: Tell us what you need and where. 51 categories across Greece.
howItWorks.customerStep2Desc: Browse profiles, reviews, prices and availability. No commitment.
howItWorks.customerStep3Desc: Call directly or book an appointment online — you choose.
howItWorks.customerStep4Desc: Leave a review after the service and help the community.
howItWorks.proPageTitle: From sign-up to earnings in 4 steps
howItWorks.proPageSub: The fairest platform for professionals in Greece.
howItWorks.proPageStep1Desc: Just 2 minutes. 3 months completely FREE. No credit card needed.
howItWorks.proPageStep2Desc: Photos, services, prices, schedule. Visible across Greece in minutes.
howItWorks.proPageStep3Desc: By phone or online — you choose. Customers find you via search or Google.
howItWorks.proPageStep4Desc: Get paid directly. We take €0 from your earnings. Ever.
howItWorks.modesSub: Every professional chooses their booking mode at sign-up. They can change it anytime.
howItWorks.mode1Sees: The customer sees phone + email and calls directly.
howItWorks.mode2Sees: The customer picks a date and describes their need. The professional confirms.
howItWorks.mode3Sees: Choose service → date → time → price calculated. Automatic confirmation.
howItWorks.mode3Needs: Requires a Business Page + min 1 service
howItWorks.faq1Q: How much does it cost for customers?
howItWorks.faq1A: Nothing. The platform is completely free for customers. You don't need an account to find a professional — just search and contact.
howItWorks.faq2Q: How much does it cost for professionals?
howItWorks.faq2A: From €2.75/month with the annual plan (Intro Price). The first 3 months are completely free, no credit card. After the free period, choose a plan or your profile stops appearing (it isn't deleted).
howItWorks.faq3Q: How do I pay the professional?
howItWorks.faq3A: Directly — cash, card or bank transfer. Trustia doesn't handle payments and takes no commission. You and the professional arrange payment between yourselves.
howItWorks.faq4A: Yes. Cancellation is free and can be done anytime from the booking page. Cancellations appear in history for community transparency.
howItWorks.faq5A: There are three review types with different weights: ✓ Verified (from a completed booking, weight 2×), 🔗 Invited (via professional's invite link, weight 1×) and User (any registered user, weight 0.5×). The rating is a weighted average.
howItWorks.faq6A: All professionals have a public profile with reviews from real customers. We don't pre-verify identity, but the review system and profile transparency (phone, city, category) help you make an informed decision.
howItWorks.dualCtaCustomerDesc: Find a professional near you for free.

professionals.heroSub: Sign up for free. Zero commission. Keep 100% of your earnings.
professionals.pricingSub: One flat monthly fee. No hidden charges.
professionals.compSub: Existing platforms take a large cut of your revenue. We don't.
professionals.compFootnote: * Comparison based on publicly available competitor prices, May 2026
professionals.pricingIntroSub: Three tiers. Choose the duration that suits you. Lock in the price forever.
professionals.pricingFoundingNote: The first 50 professionals lock in this price forever, even if prices rise in the future.
professionals.stepsTitle: From sign-up to earnings in 4 steps
professionals.step1Desc: Choose your category, booking mode and plan. No credit card needed.
professionals.step2Desc: Photo, bio, price, services. Visible across Greece in minutes.
professionals.step3Desc: Customers find you via search or Google. They contact you by phone or online booking.
professionals.step4Desc: Get paid directly by the customer. We take €0. You keep 100%.
professionals.featTitle: Everything you need to grow your client base
professionals.feat1Desc: Choose how you receive customers: phone only, date booking or full calendar.
professionals.feat2Desc: Verified reviews from bookings carry 4× weight. Your reputation grows fast.
professionals.feat3Desc: Set your availability. Auto-reject outside hours. Holidays with one click.
professionals.feat4Desc: Sell products alongside your services. For beauty categories, annual plan.
professionals.feat5Desc: Views, calls, bookings — see how customers find you. Coming soon.
professionals.feat6Desc: The first 50 lock in today's price forever, even if prices go up.
professionals.finalCtaDesc1: Sign up in 2 minutes. No credit card needed.
professionals.finalCtaDesc2: The first 3 months are completely free.
professionals.finalCtaNote: No credit card needed · Cancel anytime
